yesterdayAnalysis: Yesterday's 6.1mi run at 145 HR produced 66 TSS — a solid recovery effort following Monday's full rest. The HR and distance suggest controlled intensity, appropriate for early-week volume building. This was unscheduled (plan called for Tuesday recovery spin), but represents quality aerobic work without overreaching.
todayRecommendation: Execute today's planned pool swim (2,000m easy) and 3mi easy run as scheduled. Hip and legs should feel ready after two days of recovery-focused work. Keep both efforts conversational and prioritize form over pace.
weekProgress: Week 11 of 13 is tracking perfectly with 108 TSS of 340 target (32%) through Tuesday — exactly on pace given the back-loaded structure. Thursday's race-pace bike intervals (3x8min at 145-152w) and Friday's swim will add significant load, with the week's profile designed to taper intensity after Wednesday.
keyInsight: Sleep quality rebounded well (72 score, 8.4h) after Saturday's race effort, and RHR remains stable at 57 — physiological markers support today's return to dual-discipline training.
